title: 8 Things a Man of God Gets Hard On Himself About
caption:
Most men are soft on their own sin and sharp with everyone else. The man of God flips it.

He gets hard on himself about the private habits nobody checks. The apology he owes and hasn't made. How he treats people who can't do anything for him.

Whether he's still growing or just maintaining. What his money actually says about him. Whether his anger bleeds into the rest of the day.

He saves the gentleness for others.

"He has shown you what is good — to act justly, love mercy, and walk humbly with your God." — Micah 6:8

Save this. Take a real look.

#faith #christianmen #integrity #godlymen #manofgod #realtalk #accountability #christianity
theme: He's hard on himself, gentle with others.
